value.found_quote: Because the container runs Claude Code as a non-root user and confines command execution to the container, you can pass `--dangerously-skip-permissions` for unattended operation. The CLI rejects this flag when launched as root, so confirm `remoteUser` is set to a non-root account.
value.rationale: The page has a dedicated "Run without permission prompts" section describing passing --dangerously-skip-permissions while running Claude Code as a non-root user, matching the claim. Presented as a current capability.
